text:
dear sir
i have server thunder cache his operating system FREEBSD, the problem
when try insert card type (PEXSAT34) 4-port PCI Express SATA 6Gbps
Controller Card adds 4 internal SATA ports , and when need insert
harddisk to system is don't accept reading harddisk and the system stop
on working

Fix: 

if you can upgrade the system to make this card compatable with operating
system and make working with him to increase his advantage
